creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
I suppose fpcalc could be split out, but simply dropping it won't work as it is required by audio/picard and audio/puddletag.  I don't like switching to FFTW3 because fpcalc requires ffmpeg, it won't work with FFTW3.  The author of chromaprint recommends ffmpeg for FFT calculations in chromaprint, as well, due to speed and licensing issues.

Wouldn't it just be easier to disable chromaprint in ffmpeg?
